Skip to contents
rpolars 0.3.0
  • Reference

Polars Expr

Source: R/expr__expr.R
Expr.Rd

Polars pl$Expr

Usage

Expr_lit(x)

Expr_suffix(suffix)

Expr_prefix(prefix)

Expr_reverse()

Arguments

x

an R Scalar, or R vector (via Series) into Expr

suffix

string suffix to be added to a name

prefix

string suffix to be added to a name

Value

Expr, literal of that value

Expr

Expr

Expr

Details

pl$lit(NULL) translates into a typeless polars Null

Examples

2+2
#> [1] 4
#Expr has the following methods/constructors
ls(rpolars:::Expr)
#>   [1] "abs"              "add"              "agg_groups"      
#>   [4] "alias"            "all"              "and"             
#>   [7] "any"              "append"           "apply"           
#>  [10] "arccos"           "arccosh"          "arcsin"          
#>  [13] "arcsinh"          "arctan"           "arctanh"         
#>  [16] "arg_max"          "arg_min"          "arg_sort"        
#>  [19] "arg_unique"       "argsort"          "backward_fill"   
#>  [22] "cast"             "ceil"             "clip"            
#>  [25] "clip_max"         "clip_min"         "cos"             
#>  [28] "cosh"             "count"            "cumcount"        
#>  [31] "cummax"           "cummin"           "cumprod"         
#>  [34] "cumsum"           "cumulative_eval"  "diff"            
#>  [37] "div"              "dot"              "drop_nans"       
#>  [40] "drop_nulls"       "entropy"          "eq"              
#>  [43] "ewm_mean"         "ewm_std"          "ewm_var"         
#>  [46] "exclude"          "exp"              "explode"         
#>  [49] "extend_constant"  "extend_expr"      "fill_nan"        
#>  [52] "fill_null"        "filter"           "first"           
#>  [55] "flatten"          "floor"            "forward_fill"    
#>  [58] "gt"               "gt_eq"            "hash"            
#>  [61] "head"             "inspect"          "interpolate"     
#>  [64] "is_between"       "is_duplicated"    "is_finite"       
#>  [67] "is_first"         "is_in"            "is_infinite"     
#>  [70] "is_nan"           "is_not"           "is_not_nan"      
#>  [73] "is_not_null"      "is_null"          "is_unique"       
#>  [76] "keep_name"        "kurtosis"         "last"            
#>  [79] "len"              "limit"            "list"            
#>  [82] "lit"              "log"              "log10"           
#>  [85] "lower_bound"      "lt"               "lt_eq"           
#>  [88] "map"              "map_alias"        "max"             
#>  [91] "mean"             "median"           "min"             
#>  [94] "mode"             "mul"              "n_unique"        
#>  [97] "nan_max"          "nan_min"          "neq"             
#> [100] "null_count"       "or"               "over"            
#> [103] "pct_change"       "pow"              "prefix"          
#> [106] "print"            "product"          "quantile"        
#> [109] "rank"             "rechunk"          "reinterpret"     
#> [112] "rep"              "rep_extend"       "repeat_by"       
#> [115] "reshape"          "reverse"          "rolling_max"     
#> [118] "rolling_mean"     "rolling_median"   "rolling_min"     
#> [121] "rolling_quantile" "rolling_skew"     "rolling_std"     
#> [124] "rolling_sum"      "rolling_var"      "round"           
#> [127] "rpow"             "sample"           "search_sorted"   
#> [130] "set_sorted"       "shift"            "shift_and_fill"  
#> [133] "shrink_dtype"     "shuffle"          "sign"            
#> [136] "sin"              "sinh"             "skew"            
#> [139] "slice"            "sort"             "sort_by"         
#> [142] "sqrt"             "std"              "sub"             
#> [145] "suffix"           "sum"              "tail"            
#> [148] "take"             "take_every"       "tan"             
#> [151] "tanh"             "to_physical"      "to_r"            
#> [154] "top_k"            "unique"           "unique_counts"   
#> [157] "upper_bound"      "value_counts"     "var"             
#> [160] "where"            "xor"             

pl$col("this_column")$sum()$over("that_column")
#> polars Expr: col("this_column").sum().over([col("that_column")])
#scalars to literal, explit `pl$lit(42)` implicit `+ 2`
pl$col("some_column") / pl$lit(42) + 2
#> polars Expr: [([(col("some_column")) / (42f64)]) + (2f64)]

#vector to literal explicitly via Series and back again
pl$DataFrame(list())$select(pl$lit(pl$Series(1:4)))$to_list()[[1L]] #R vector to expression and back again
#> [1] 1 2 3 4

#vectors to literal implicitly
(pl$lit(2) + 1:4 ) / 4:1
#> polars Expr: [([(2f64) + (Series)]) / (Series)]
pl$col("some")$suffix("_column")
#> polars Expr: RENAME_ALIAS col("some")
pl$col("some")$suffix("_column")
#> polars Expr: RENAME_ALIAS col("some")
pl$DataFrame(list(a=1:5))$select(pl$col("a")$reverse())
#> polars DataFrame: shape: (5, 1)
#> ┌─────┐
#> │ a   │
#> │ --- │
#> │ i32 │
#> ╞═════╡
#> │ 5   │
#> ├╌╌╌╌╌┤
#> │ 4   │
#> ├╌╌╌╌╌┤
#> │ 3   │
#> ├╌╌╌╌╌┤
#> │ 2   │
#> ├╌╌╌╌╌┤
#> │ 1   │
#> └─────┘
